summary: InstallPrompt is sanctuary-only (unconditional, no redesign selector)
LLM forbidden from markdown in chatbot responses (use plain text + <em> tags)
CSS var() fallback doesn't work when token defined with wrong value in legacy :root
rule: Use hexadecimal hardcoded instead of var() with fallback

summary: Wave 14: Shared Components + Chatbot Sanctuary (Loading skeleton, AlertList, Calendar, ChatWindow, Gamification)
Separated purchases/inventory domains with dedicated services and RPCs (create_purchase_with_stock, consume_stock_fifo)
Bot must use identical RPCs and services as web app to avoid drift
Weekly audit required for web/bot code drift in stock and API logic
